# IOHIDCompletion

**Structure**

A structure specifying the action to perform when a set/get report completes.

## Declaration

```swift
typedef struct IOHIDCompletion { ... } IOHIDCompletion;
```

## Getting the Completion Handler Properties

- **target**: The target to pass to the action function.
- **action**: The function to call.
- **parameter**: The parameter to pass to the action function.

## Internal Structures

- **IOHIDCompletionAction**: A function to call when a report operation completes.
- **HIDReportCommandType**: The type of the report command for a DriverKit driver.
- **HIDActionType**

items.description: The target to pass to the action function.
items.name: target

items.description: The parameter to pass to the action function.
items.name: parameter
